314 I5800_DPRSN_CD I5800_DPRSN_CD I5800 Active Diagnoses: Depression Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident had an active diagnosis of depression (other than bipolar) in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
